512100.SS.name: 中证1000 ETF
512100.SS.note: yfinance data only from 2025-10-09, partial year

missed_rallies.name: 安集科技

exclusion_details.exclusion_reason: MAX_POSITIONS: DIP position (300347) + 4 MOM = 5 total; adding 688019 would exceed limit
MIN_CASH_VIOLATED: 4 MOM positions × 20% = 80% invested = cash floor; 5th position impossible
SECTOR_SEMI_OVERWEIGHT: 002028 already held (SEMI sector), adding 688019 (also SEMI) would exceed MAX_SECTOR_PCT=35%; 002371 (#3 SEMI) blocked first, then 688019 (#4 SEMI) blocked

missed_rallies.primary_exclusion_cause: Structural: MIN_CASH_PCT=20% + MAX_POS_PCT=20% = effective max 4 positions, not 5. 688019 persistently ranked #5 in SEMI sector.

missed_rallies.name: 宁德时代

exclusion_details.exclusion_reason: MIN_CASH_VIOLATED: 4 MOM buys (510300, 002230, 601318, 601877) = 80% invested before 300750 was reached in iteration
MIN_CASH_VIOLATED: 300274 (#1) and 002371 (#3) were ranked above/adjacent; 300750 would be 5th actual purchase after 300274, 002371, 300014, 002920 exhausted slots
exclusion_details.note: 300750 ranked #2 globally but only got to queue position ~5 after existing holdings cleared

missed_rallies.net_missed_pnl_estimate: ¥+68,795 (both entries low-return periods; bulk of +46.8% not in these windows)
missed_rallies.primary_exclusion_cause: MIN_CASH_PCT floor. On the dates it entered top7, the 5th slot was already full. The +46.8% annual return was distributed across the full year, not concentrated in these 2 rebalancing windows.

missed_rallies.name: 中芯国际
missed_rallies.exclusion_reason: RS_BELOW_TOP7_CUTOFF all year: best rank was #8 (Jan 2025). Never broke into top7 despite +39.3% annual return. Return was distributed with high volatility — momentum lagged peers.

RS_BELOW_TOP7_CUTOFF.description: Ticker had positive RS score but ranked below #7 in full universe at rebalancing dates
RS_BELOW_TOP7_CUTOFF.note: Primary filter — accounts for most never-traded cases

MIN_CASH_VIOLATED.description: 4 positions × MAX_POS_PCT(20%) = 80% invested = cash floor; 5th position at 20% impossible. STRUCTURAL BUG: MAX_POSITIONS=5 is unreachable given MIN_CASH_PCT=20% + MAX_POS_PCT=20%.
MIN_CASH_VIOLATED.structural_note: The constraint math: 5×20%=100% > (1-20%)=80%. Effective max positions = 4, not 5. Top7 candidates #5, #6, #7 are unreachable whenever a full 4-position portfolio is assembled.

SECTOR_SEMI_OVERWEIGHT.description: SEMI sector already at 20% (002028 held), adding another SEMI ticker would exceed MAX_SECTOR_PCT=35%. Blocked 002371 (#3), 688019 (#4), 300502 (#7) at Dec 1 rebal.

MAX_POSITIONS_DIP_CONTENTION.description: DIP positions count against MAX_POSITIONS=5 limit, reducing MOM slots available

CRASH_FILTER.note: Apr 7 was the global tariff shock day; correctly filtered

NEGATIVE_RS_OR_LOW_RS.description: Tickers with poor/negative momentum throughout the year
NEGATIVE_RS_OR_LOW_RS.note: Framework CORRECTLY excluded these; all had negative/flat 2025 returns

key_finding.structural_bug: MIN_CASH_PCT=20% + MAX_POS_PCT=20% + MAX_POSITIONS=5 is internally inconsistent. 5×20%=100% invested leaving 0% cash, violating MIN_CASH_PCT=20%. Effective cap is 4 positions. The top7 selection is meaningless beyond rank 4 — slots 5-7 are dead code.
key_finding.biggest_missed_ticker: 688019.SS (安集科技) +110.7% in 2025. Entered top7 ranking 4 times but was blocked by MIN_CASH or SECTOR constraints each time. Net missed PnL ≈ ¥+420K on 3 positive windows.
key_finding.correct_exclusions: Framework correctly never traded 000858(-16%), 002304(-20%), 300760(-19%), 002179(-4%), 600893(-1%) — all underperformed. The RS signal quality is sound.
key_finding.framework_verdict: RS + liquidity + crash filter logic is valid. The position-sizing arithmetic is broken. Fixing MIN_CASH_PCT to 10% (or MAX_POSITIONS to 4, or MAX_POS_PCT to 16%) would allow the top5 to actually be held.
